# Repository Metadata

This file records the intended GitHub profile metadata for the current public release.

## Recommended Description

```text
MATLAB offline flight-analysis dashboard for Caelum telemetry, estimator replay, firmware contract validation, live serial playback, and mission evidence review.
```

## Recommended Topics

```text
matlab
flight-analysis
telemetry
rocket
aerospace
sensor-fusion
estimator-replay
kalman-filter
gps
serial-telemetry
teensy
firmware-validation
monte-carlo
dashboard
validation
caelum
```

## Suggested Website / Project Link

```text
https://github.com/DavidRichardson02/Offline_Flight_Analysis_Dashboard
```

## Notes

The available GitHub connector can update repository files, but it does not expose a repository-settings endpoint for directly changing the GitHub description, About panel, homepage, or topics. The values above are therefore tracked in the repository for manual application in the GitHub web UI.

To apply them manually:

1. Open the repository on GitHub.
2. Select the gear icon beside the repository About panel.
3. Paste the description.
4. Add the listed topics.
5. Save changes.
